Tracking 
Monitor at least one process measure of antibiotic use and at least one outcome from antibiotic use in your facility.
Appendix B: Tracking and Reporting Antimicrobial Use—Beginner 
Appendix C: Tracking and Reporting Antimicrobial Use—Advanced 
Infection Tracking Logs | Center for Long-Term Care Quality and Innovation | Brown University 
Reporting 
Provide regular feedback on antibiotic use and resistance to prescribing clinicians, nursing staff and other relevant staff for your facility.
Education 
Provide resources to clinicians, nursing staff, LTC residents, and families about antimicrobial resistance and opportunities for improving antibiotic use.
